Politics.headline: Trump says Iran will suspend nuclear program as Hormuz opens
Politics.detail: U.S. President Donald Trump stated that Iran has agreed to suspend its nuclear program indefinitely, expressing optimism about a potential deal to end their war after Tehran announced the Strait of Hormuz was open again. Trump asserted that any moratorium on Iran's nuclear activities would not expire, saying it would be 'unlimited'.

Politics.headline: China steps up Iran diplomacy while seeking smooth summit with Trump
Politics.detail: China is increasing its diplomatic efforts to resolve the Iran war as it prepares for a summit between President Xi Jinping and U.S. President Donald Trump next month, aiming to balance its energy security interests with its diplomatic strategy. Trump has credited Beijing with helping to bring Iran to recent peace talks in Pakistan.

Politics.headline: Demonstration Alert: U. S. Consulate, Milan, Italy, April 18, 2026
Politics.detail: The U.S. Consulate in Milan issued an alert regarding three authorized demonstrations planned for April 18, 2026, involving anti-immigration, pro-Palestinian/immigrant rights, and leftist groups, all expected to cause disruptions throughout the city. Demonstrators are expected to gather in different locations and march through various routes, potentially impacting traffic and public order.

Politics.headline: Aoun: Lebanon has regained its sovereign decision, will not be arena for others' wars
Politics.detail: Lebanese President Joseph Aoun announced that Lebanon has regained its sovereign decision-making ability following a ceasefire with Israel, emphasizing that Lebanon will no longer be a battleground for other nations' conflicts. He stated that Lebanon is entering a new phase focused on lasting agreements that protect the rights of the people, national sovereignty, and territorial unity.

Politics.headline: EU to restore relations with Syria
Politics.detail: The EU is planning to deepen its engagement with Syria by re-launching formal political contacts and paving the way for closer economic and security ties. The EU would fully resume its 1978 cooperation agreement with Syria and begin a High-Level Political Dialogue with the country's transitional authorities on May 11.

Finance & Economy.headline: Oil prices drop below $90 a barrel after Iran says strait of Hormuz is open
Finance & Economy.detail: Oil prices experienced a significant drop following Iran's announcement that the Strait of Hormuz is open for commercial vessels, contributing to market volatility.

Finance & Economy.headline: Wall Street sets another record after US stocks tick higher
Finance & Economy.detail: The U.S. stock market continues its rally, achieving another record as investor sentiment remains positive.

Finance & Economy.headline: Canadian Real Estate Association downgrades housing market forecast due to 'oil shock'
Finance & Economy.detail: The Canadian Real Estate Association has revised its housing market forecast downward, citing the impact of the recent 'oil shock' on the economy.

Finance & Economy.headline: FATF changes its grey listing criteria to further focus on risk
Finance & Economy.detail: The Financial Action Task Force (FATF) has updated its criteria for grey listing countries, aiming to focus on those posing the most significant risks to the international financial system and alleviate pressure on less developed nations.

Finance & Economy.headline: HDFC Bank Q4 preview: PAT seen stable with up to 10% YoY growth; NIM pressure persists
Finance & Economy.detail: HDFC Bank's Q4 preview suggests stable profit after tax (PAT) with a potential year-over-year growth of up to 10%, while net interest margin (NIM) pressure is expected to continue.

Technology.headline: I Tested Qualcomm's Snapdragon X2 Elite Extreme: This 18-Core Power CPU Hits Hard Against AMD, Apple, Intel
Technology.detail: Inside Asus' featherweight Zenbook A16, Qualcomm's new flagship laptop chip flexes massive multi-core muscle, upgraded graphics, and real momentum against the competition, according to PCMag's initial tests.

Technology.headline: Netflix to Launch Redesigned Mobile App With Vertical Video Later This Month
Technology.detail: Netflix is planning to roll out a redesigned mobile app that includes vertical video feed later this month, according to PCMag.

Technology.headline: Like It or Not, Google Wants to Be Your AI Travel Buddy This Summer
Technology.detail: Google is aiming to integrate AI more deeply into travel planning this summer, offering features to help users plan trips, according to PCMag.

Technology.headline: Anthropic CEO heads to White House amid hacking fears over new AI model
Technology.detail: The CEO of Anthropic met with White House officials to discuss the company's new AI model, Mythos, which is believed to have the ability to identify security vulnerabilities, raising both hopes and concerns.

Technology.headline: Intel eases reliance on TSMC with 'Merica-made Core Series 3 processors
Technology.detail: Intel is producing stripped-down Ultra processors for laptops and low-power edge boxes in America, reducing their dependence on TSMC.

Science.headline: Scientists Found 5.5 Million Bees Living Beneath a New York Cemetery
Science.detail: A massive bee colony, containing 5.5 million bees, was discovered thriving beneath a New York cemetery, showcasing the resilience and adaptability of these vital pollinators.

Science.headline: First Black Hole Ever Discovered 62 Years Ago Is Emitting Jets With Energy Of 10,000 Suns
Science.detail: The first black hole ever discovered is emitting jets with an energy equivalent to 10,000 suns, revealing new insights into the behavior of these cosmic phenomena.

Science.headline: Red hair gene favoured by natural selection over last 10,000 years, study finds
Science.detail: A study analyzing nearly 16,000 ancient remains suggests that red hair and fair skin have been favored by natural selection for vitamin D production over the last 10,000 years.

Science.headline: 250-Million-Year-Old Egg Solves One of Evolution's Biggest Mysteries
Science.detail: The discovery of a Lystrosaurus embryo inside a 250-million-year-old egg proves that early mammal relatives laid eggs, providing crucial evidence for understanding the evolution of reproductive strategies.

Science.headline: Scientists Captured Light in a Trap 2,000 Times Thinner Than a Human Hair
Science.detail: Scientists have successfully trapped light in a space 2,000 times thinner than a human hair, marking a significant advancement in the field of nanophotonics and potentially revolutionizing optical technologies.

Health.headline: China-funded oxygen concentrators delivered to boost healthcare in Benin
Health.detail: A batch of 600 oxygen concentrators, funded by China and procured by the United Nations Children's Fund, has been delivered to Benin to help improve healthcare services and strengthen emergency response capacity in health facilities. Benin's Minister of Health Benjamin Hounkpatin officially received the equipment.

Health.headline: Saturday News Recap April 18, 2026
Health.detail: The Jamaica Information Service presents a news recap for April 18, 2026, hosted by Joy Kelly. The recap includes various news items relevant to Jamaica.

Health.headline: Growth Slowdown Often Seen in Suspected Cow's Milk Allergy
Health.detail: Medscape Medical News reports that growth slowdown is often observed in children with suspected cow's milk allergy. This highlights the importance of monitoring growth in children with potential food allergies.

Health.headline: What Will Ontario's 2026 Budget Mean for Healthcare?
Health.detail: Medscape News Canada discusses the implications of Ontario's 2026 budget for the healthcare sector. The article likely covers funding allocations, policy changes, and their potential impact on healthcare services in the region.

Health.headline: Chronic Pancreatitis: Algorithm-Based Care Matches Standard
Health.detail: Medscape Medical News reports that algorithm-based care for chronic pancreatitis shows similar results to standard care approaches. This suggests that technology-driven protocols could be effectively implemented in managing this condition.

Sports.headline: Kevin Durant, LeBron James meet in playoffs for 4th time when Rockets visit short-handed Lakers
Sports.detail: The highly anticipated playoff matchup between Kevin Durant and LeBron James is set as the Rockets face the Lakers, who are currently dealing with injuries.

Sports.headline: Coventry returns to the Premier League after hard-fought draw at Blackburn
Sports.detail: After a challenging match, Coventry secures their return to the Premier League following a draw against Blackburn.

Sports.headline: Matt Fitzpatrick rides a good bounce and great golf to a 63 to lead Viktor Hovland at Hilton Head
Sports.detail: Matt Fitzpatrick's impressive performance, highlighted by a fortunate bounce, propels him to the lead over Viktor Hovland at Hilton Head with a score of 63.

Sports.headline: Dallas Stars and Minnesota Wild finally set for Game 1 in long-expected 1st-round NHL playoff series
Sports.detail: The Dallas Stars and Minnesota Wild are ready to face off in Game 1 of their highly anticipated first-round NHL playoff series.

Sports.headline: Scotland bid to snap streak against England in front of record crowd
Sports.detail: Scotland's rugby team is aiming to end their losing streak against England in the Women's Six Nations, playing before a record-breaking crowd.

Entertainment.headline: Suzy Cato: 'I've never had work done, there's value to older faces on the screen'
Entertainment.detail: New Zealand television icon Suzy Cato is re-releasing classic songs and new episodes of her children's show, discussing confidence at 58 and battling imposter syndrome. She emphasizes the importance of undivided attention and simple joys for children.

Entertainment.headline: Shaheen Bhatt's engagement to Ishaan Mehra
Entertainment.detail: Alia Bhatt's sister, Shaheen Bhatt, announced her engagement to fitness coach Ishaan Mehra on Instagram, sparking interest in Mehra's background and connection to the Bollywood celebrity. The couple shared glimpses of the special moment, with Shaheen flaunting her diamond ring, drawing congratulations from celebrities and fans.

Entertainment.headline: SIU's 2026 Sunset Concerts
Entertainment.detail: Southern Illinois University Carbondale is hosting its 47th annual Sunset Concert Series, beginning June 11, featuring diverse musical performances. The free, family-friendly concerts will take place on Thursday evenings at various locations, including the Shryock Auditorium lawn, Turley Park, and the New Era Events Plaza.

Entertainment.headline: Hansika Motwani on divorce
Entertainment.detail: Hansika Motwani opens up about her divorce and facing a 'dark' phase after separating from Sohael Khaturiya.

Entertainment.headline: Asha Bhosle passes away at 92
Entertainment.detail: Legendary playback singer Asha Bhosle has passed away at the age of 92 in Mumbai. Bhosle was known for her versatile and timeless voice in the Indian music industry.

Crime & Justice.headline: Bishop 'unhappy' investigation into police breath testing taking so long
Crime & Justice.detail: The Transport Minister has expressed dissatisfaction with the slow pace of an investigation into police breath testing data, after it was revealed that about 130 police officers were under investigation for falsely recording approximately 30,000 alcohol breath tests.

Crime & Justice.headline: Stray bullet kills 78-year-old Bronx man sitting on bench
Crime & Justice.detail: A 78-year-old man was killed by a stray bullet while sitting on a bench in the Bronx.

Crime & Justice.headline: 15-year-old boy shot dead in Queens park
Crime & Justice.detail: A 15-year-old boy was fatally shot in a park in Queens.

Crime & Justice.headline: 4 men charged in cartel-linked drug and gun smuggling ring in California
Crime & Justice.detail: Four men, all members of the same family, have been charged in connection with a cartel-linked drug and gun smuggling operation in Southern California, according to the Department of Justice.

Crime & Justice.headline: Shiprock Man Pleads Guilty to Assault for Stabbing
Crime & Justice.detail: A man from Shiprock has pleaded guilty to assault for stabbing another individual.

Education.headline: CBSE Class 10 Results 2026 declared: KV (99.57%), JNV (99.42%) lead pass percentage; Girls outperform boys again.
Education.detail: The Central Board of Secondary Education (CBSE) has announced the Class 10 results for 2026, with Kendriya Vidyalayas (KV) and Jawahar Navodaya Vidyalayas (JNV) leading in pass percentage and girls outperforming boys.

Education.headline: UP body to deploy AI surveillance to curb exam malpractices.
Education.detail: An Uttar Pradesh education body will be implementing AI surveillance to prevent cheating and other malpractices during examinations.

Education.headline: Lincoln Educational Services Corporation Schedules First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release And Conference Call
Education.detail: Lincoln Educational Services Corporation will release its first quarter financial results and host a conference call on May 11, 2026, to discuss the outcomes.

Education.headline: LSR Students Allege Parents Called After Peaceful Protest With Flowers.
Education.detail: Lady Shri Ram College (LSR) students in India allege that their parents were contacted after they participated in a peaceful protest involving flowers.

Education.headline: Artificial Intelligence Frustration, Skepticism: Survey Reveals Shifting Gen Z Attitudes Toward AI.
Education.detail: A recent survey indicates that Gen Z's attitudes towards Artificial Intelligence are shifting, revealing increased frustration and skepticism.

Lifestyle.headline: Megan Rapinoe and Sue Bird announce split after a decade together
Lifestyle.detail: After nearly 10 years together, soccer star Megan Rapinoe and basketball icon Sue Bird have announced their split.

Lifestyle.headline: Rising fuel costs threaten Spirit Airlines' bankruptcy exit plan: reports
Lifestyle.detail: Spirit Airlines faces increasing difficulties as rising fuel costs jeopardize its restructuring strategy and raise concerns about its financial recovery.

Lifestyle.headline: Younger adult colon cancer deaths are concentrated in people with less education, study says
Lifestyle.detail: A recent study indicates that deaths from colon cancer among younger adults are disproportionately concentrated in individuals with lower levels of education.

Lifestyle.headline: Heart surgeon warns that the onset of heart disease can start as early as age 3
Lifestyle.detail: A heart surgeon cautions that the development of heart disease can begin as early as age 3, highlighting the importance of early preventative measures.

Lifestyle.headline: Sleeping without a pillow could have surprising health benefit, study suggests
Lifestyle.detail: A recent study suggests that sleeping without a pillow may offer unexpected health benefits.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: EDITORIAL: Prejudice blocks Indian migrant plan
Opinion/Editorial.detail: An editorial discusses the controversy surrounding the government's plan to introduce migrant workers from India, highlighting the prejudice and challenges involved in the process. The plan, part of a memorandum of understanding between Taipei and India signed in February 2024, aims to bring the first group of Indian workers to Taiwan as early as this year.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: The public just wants stability
Opinion/Editorial.detail: The IMF has issued a warning that it is revising its global economic growth forecasts downward, and inflation risks are on the rise. If the war in the Middle East continues, the world could be pushed toward recession and these effects are borne out materially for Taiwan.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: N Korea played the Taiwan card
Opinion/Editorial.detail: South Korean Ministry of Foreign Affairs released declassified diplomatic records from 1995 that drew wide domestic media attention. One revelation stood out: North Korea had once raised the possibility of diplomatic relations with Taiwan.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: The overlooked middle class
Opinion/Editorial.detail: An opinion piece discusses the risks of transient poverty in the Philippines, where individuals who have statistically emerged from poverty could be quickly pushed back due to various factors. It argues for forward-looking policies and institutionalized economic vulnerability monitoring to support the growth of a secure middle class.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: Letters: Defence spending should not be a choice of welfare or warfare
Opinion/Editorial.detail: Readers share their opinions on Peter Mandelson's vetting process, reparations, and the balance between defense spending and welfare. The Guardian also presents its views on Starmer and Mandelson, boosting the arts, a ceasefire for Lebanon, and drugs in prisons.

World.headline: Iran Declares Strait of Hormuz Open Amid Ceasefire, Oil Prices Plunge
World.detail: Iran announced that the Strait of Hormuz is open for commercial vessels following a ceasefire, leading to a sharp drop in oil prices.

World.headline: Ukraine Scrambles to Supply Air Defenses as Large-Scale Russia Attacks Kill 16
World.detail: Amidst ongoing conflict, Ukraine is working to bolster its air defenses following significant Russian attacks that resulted in multiple casualties.

World.headline: Trump Says Iranians Have 'Agreed to Everything,' Including Removal of Enriched Uranium
World.detail: President Trump claimed that Iran has conceded to all U.S. demands, including the removal of enriched uranium, during a recent interview.

World.headline: UN Warns South Sudan at Risk of 'Full-Scale Famine' as Fighting Intensifies
World.detail: The UN is cautioning that South Sudan faces a severe famine risk due to escalating conflict and increasing humanitarian needs.

World.headline: More Than Half of Britons Support Rejoining EU 10 Years on From Brexit Vote
World.detail: A decade after the Brexit vote, a majority of Britons now favor rejoining the European Union, according to recent reports.

Zimbabwe.headline: Kombi explosion: 12 bodies recovered
Zimbabwe.detail: Twelve bodies have been recovered following a fatal explosion involving a Toyota Quantum.

Zimbabwe.headline: Production the key: President
Zimbabwe.detail: President Mnangagwa stated that Heritage-Based Education must help learners to be equipped with science, innovation and critical thinking skills.

Zimbabwe.headline: 'Let's move in unison to build Zim'
Zimbabwe.detail: An article emphasizing the importance of unity in building Zimbabwe.

Zimbabwe.headline: President reaffirms commitment to war veterans welfare
Zimbabwe.detail: President Mnangagwa has reaffirmed his commitment to the welfare of war veterans.

Zimbabwe.headline: Maphisa Stadium gives youth a fighting chance
Zimbabwe.detail: Langalakhe Masuku, a 14-year-old, sees the Maphisa Stadium as a chance to achieve his dream of becoming a football star.
